title: marrubium globosum subsp. micranthum
intro: Marrubium globosum subsp. micranthum is a subspecies of the Marrubium globosum plant, a type of flowering perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Marrubium globosum subsp. micranthum include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as potential anti-anxiety and anti-depressant effects. Marrubium globosum subsp. micranthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its purported therapeutic properties.
